title: Update header logo with uploaded white Fons logo

requirements.summary: Replace the Hero section header logo with the uploaded white Fons logo PNG file
acceptanceCriteria: The Hero section displays the new white Fons logo
The logo maintains appropriate size and positioning in the header
The logo is visible against the background

file_operations.description: Update the logo image source in the Hero component to use the uploaded white Fons logo file 'PNG FONS LOGO E BARDHE.png' from the assets directory. Ensure the logo maintains appropriate sizing and visibility against the hero background. Do not modify any other logo instances in the application.
